default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and review progress on article refreshes for Goodcall's SEO efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [7 new content clusters identified; team seeking alignment on relevance and direction](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [AI answering service and industry-specific clusters validated as high-priority focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=25.0)
  - [Article refresh process underway with 10 articles completed, ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=218.0)
  - [Call center and Genesis cluster requires further research, focusing on AI automation and integration with platforms like Genesis, Nice, Five9](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)

## Topics

### Content Cluster Strategy

  - [7 new clusters identified, focusing on Goodcall's primary offerings and high-impact industries](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [AI answering service for specific industries and business types are key clusters](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - ["Best AI tools" cluster validated, but requires careful consideration of terminology (tools vs. services vs. software)](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Lead management cluster deemed irrelevant and to be scrapped](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Emphasis on creating content that targets various related terms (tools, apps, agents) to capture broader search intent](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)

### SEO Approach and Keyword Strategy

  - [Moving beyond strict keyword focus to more contextual, thematic content](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)
  - [Balancing specific terms with high-quality, relevant content that solves pain points](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Importance of market research and data-driven decisions in keyword selection](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)
  - [Targeting comparison and advice-seeking queries within the AI space](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)

### Article Refresh Process

  - [10 articles refreshed and ready for publishing](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)
  - [Team given autonomy to select and refresh articles without explicit approval](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)
  - [Articles can be auto-published to avoid bottlenecks](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Focus on adding relevant content, addressing content gaps, and leveraging untapped keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### Call Center and Genesis Cluster

  - [Focus on AI automation, productivity, efficiency, and AI agents for call centers](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Research competitors like Cresta and Replicant for keyword inspiration](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Target keywords related to AI integration with platforms like Genesis, Nice, Five9](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [Consider creating content for specific roles (e.g., AI for head of CX) and industry subtypes (e.g., AI voice for trucking logistics)](https://fathom.video/share/RZGx7_Ersx5EyQEGAVJEuvHA6qJRzEMK?tab=summary&timestamp=1716.0)

## Next Steps

  - Continue refining content clusters based on feedback
  - Proceed with publishing refreshed articles
  - Conduct deeper research on call center and Genesis cluster, focusing on AI automation and integration
  - Create initial collaboration articles for review
  - Team to provide updates on article refreshes and new content via Slack

action_items.description: Add enterprise angles & more health focus to the AI answering service cluster.
Remove lead management cluster from the content strategy.
Publish the 10 refreshed articles on the website.
Notify Bob & Daniel via Slack about newly published refreshed content.
Research & incorporate Cresta, Replicant, Nice, Five9 keywords into the call center/Genesis cluster.
Create initial collaboration articles for review and share them with Bob & Daniel for their feedback.
